rationale: Surface shape: CWE-787 unbounded memcpy into a fixed 128B stack buffer. Gated by `capable(CAP_SYS_NICE)`. CAP_SYS_NICE only grants scheduling-priority control; memory-corruption from this gate IS a privilege escalation. Axis-4 (capability_check) detects the cap call site. Verdict falls through to UNCERTAIN (no other axis fires).
